metadata.agent: PRN Negeri Sembilan 2026 Sentiment Analysis Agent (cron)
metadata.entity_build: processed-entities/20260719/entities-20260719-0507.json (167 entities) + 064654 raw-scrape enrichment (18 full-text articles, ~44,684 chars)
metadata.election_milestone: Campaign Period Day 1 (Nomination Day 18 Jul 2026 closed; Day-1 19 Jul ~14:46 MYT). Polling 1 Aug 2026; early voting 28 Jul; BN manifesto 24 Jul (DUN Linggi). Electorate 889,490.
metadata.score_convention: SIGNED per mission directive: negative sentiment = negative score (-1.0 to -0.1); neutral = -0.1 to +0.1; positive = +0.1 to +1.0. (Prior rev1-9 used unsigned magnitude; converted here for spec compliance.)

pir_06_rules.critical_threshold: Flag sharp sentiment shifts (>30% change) for any PIR-06 entity
pir_06_rules.monitor: toxic PN / termination / pecat sentiment trajectory
pir_06_rules.alert: If Bersatu sentiment turns sharply negative (internal-fracture signal), flag [CRITICAL]

pir_07_rules.critical_threshold: Flag any seat where incumbent/leading candidate sentiment drops >20%
pir_07_rules.monitor: fleeing Sikamat narrative sentiment impact on Aminuddin
pir_07_rules.alert: If defector-framing sentiment intensifies at N.14, flag [PRIORITY]

pir_16_rules.critical_threshold: Flag any narrative showing rapid viral amplification (>50% volume increase)
pir_16_rules.monitor: majoriti mudah (BN confidence) vs not taking for granted (PH defence)
pir_16_rules.alert: If Aminuddin fled Sikamat frame gains negative traction, flag [PRIORITY]

counts.note: Priority narrative-level alerts = 8 (alerts.priority array); per-entity alert=priority = 9 (adds N.14 PN candidate Rafie, candidate-level manifestation of the N.14 defector-framing watch).

critical.trigger: Bersatu internal-fracture signal sharp-negative (qualitative rule fires; numeric >30% shift NOT breached: thread -0.82 -> -0.85 = +3.7%)
critical.status: CARRIED + ESCALATED. Formal PN-MT removal notice STILL NOT DETECTED (8 consecutive passes since 170837). Precursors INTENSIFIED this cycle: Kiandee 'quorum' attack (new vector questioning Bersatu's internal legitimacy), PAS-may-be-expelled analyst framing (inverse-speculation), Bersatu-advised-to-quit-PN-with-Gerakan/MIPP (IIUM Lau Zhe Wei), analyst-wipeout pronouncement (USM Azeem Fazwan + Azmil Tayeb: 'perebutan kuasa dalam Bersatu').

critical.trigger: Internal-fracture signal; three-sided (Kiandee/PN attack + Muhyiddin/Bersatu retaliation + Hadi/PAS blame-shift) viral-amplification-reinforced + escalated by 3 new attack vectors

critical.entity: 'Bersatu in disarray' / 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' narrative
critical.trigger: PIR-16 rapid viral amplification (>50% volume increase). rev9 had ~1-2 framings (mkini 'imminent?' SNAPSHOT). rev10 adds 3 new attack vectors in ONE cycle: (1) Kiandee quorum question, (2) PAS-may-leave/be-expelled (Star), (3) Bersatu-advised-to-quit (FMT) + analyst-wipeout pronouncements. Volume of 'Bersatu disarray' framing roughly DOUBLED -> >50% criterion met.
critical.status: NEW CRITICAL. Most explicit multi-source 'Bersatu is failing' consensus to date. -0.42 -> -0.60 (+43% magnitude).

critical.trigger: Bersatu sentiment turns sharply negative on internal-fracture signal (per directive rule). Kiandee quorum attack questions whether Supreme Council even has quorum (internal-legitimacy attack); USM Azmil Tayeb: 'perebutan kuasa dalam Bersatu' (power struggle within Bersatu); USM Azeem Fazwan: 'Bersatu tidak berada dalam kedudukan untuk menang kerusi dengan bertanding solo'; IIUM Lau Zhe Wei advises Bersatu to quit PN. Numeric shift +8.1% (under >30% threshold) BUT qualitative internal-fracture signal fires the CRITICAL rule.

Internal-fracture signal applies to Bersatu president. Kiandee quorum attack directly names Muhyiddin ('asks Muhyiddin if Supreme Council still has quorum'). Hadi blame-shift + analyst-wipeout + graft-trial ongoing. Numeric shift +3.7% (under >30%) BUT directional deepening significant.

priority.entity: Melaka PH-BN fracture (DAP withdrawal from state government)
priority.trigger: Rapid viral amplification (carried from rev9: +600% source count). rev10: no NEW Melaka content; stable/declining visibility as cycle shifts to NS Day-1. Dominant PIR-16 frame for DAP acceptance in NS Malay seats.

Viral amplification watch. NEW this cycle, amplified EN+BM via FMT (full text). Loke mocks MCA's 'generosity' ceding Lobak/Mambau/Lukut to PN. MCA rebuttal (Wee/Mah Hang Soon) expected -> amplification risk.

priority.entity: Harapan Youth (AMH) demands BN ministers quit Cabinet
priority.trigger: Amplification signal: PM Anwar responded directly ('resign if you want to attack unity partners') — confirms the AMH demand rose to PM-intervention level.
Director-flagged monitor. Narrative persists (carryover); Aminuddin denies, frames as strategic. NOT intensifying this cycle but ACTIVE.

priority.entity: N.14 Ampangan defector-framing (PH 'defector' attack on PN's Rafie)
priority.trigger: Director-flagged: 'If defector-framing sentiment intensifies at N.14, flag [PRIORITY].' Framing ACTIVE (carryover) but NOT intensifying in 064654 recovered content.
High viral-potential; full body NOT fetched (paywalled). Headline+description derived. Amplification watch continues.
Linked to 'barking dogs' narrative; PN-camp negative framing.

priority.entity: Aminuddin Harun (PH incumbent MB, N.32 Linggi)
priority.trigger: Director-flagged monitor ('fleeing Sikamat' impact on Aminuddin). NO >20% sentiment drop detected; sentiment stable at +0.62. 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame NOT gaining negative traction (frame is 'pindah kawasan'/'move seat', not 'fled'). Watch continues.

entities.rationale: Kiandee quorum attack (new vector) + PAS-may-be-expelled (Star) + Bersatu-advised-to-quit (FMT) + analyst-wipeout. Formal PN-MT notice still NOT detected (8 passes).
Kiandee quorum attack names him directly; Hadi blame-shift; 'new coalition after NS' hint; graft-trial ongoing; analyst-wipeout. Internal-fracture signal applies to Bersatu president.

Kiandee quorum (internal-legitimacy attack); Azmil 'perebutan kuasa dalam Bersatu'; Azeem 'not in position to win solo'; own-logo 24 seats; 7 Bersatu-vs-PN ballot clashes. Internal-fracture signal sharp-negative -> CRITICAL per directive rule.
Three-sided (Kiandee/PN + Muhyiddin/Bersatu + Hadi/PAS) viral-amplification-reinforced + escalated by 3 new vectors this cycle.

entities.entity: 'Bersatu in disarray' / 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' narrative
entities.rationale: RAPID VIRAL AMPLIFICATION (>50% volume): 3 new attack vectors in one cycle (quorum + PAS-expel + quit-advice) + analyst-wipeout. Multi-source 'Bersatu is failing' consensus. PIR-16 critical-threshold fired.

entities.entity: Muhyiddin graft-trial frame (RM24.4m Jana Wibawa + RM1m Bersatu)
entities.rationale: Ongoing trial drains Bersatu/Muhyiddin credibility. Reinforces Muhyiddin negative trajectory. Not amplifying this cycle.
Hadi denies PAS made PN toxic, blames Bersatu (carryover). Still active two-sided warfare.
Director PIR-06 monitor narrative. Active two-sided (Hadi denies / Muhyiddin accuses). Trajectory toward 'pecat'/termination formalization but not there.
Kiandee quorum attack is latest 'pecat'-adjacent escalation. No formal pecat. Trajectory toward formalization deepening.
Confirmed: Gemas = PKR Siti Aishah vs Wawasan Ridzuan. His quit = Bersatu-cohesion negative (scored under Bersatu). For him personally: neutral strategic move.
Originator of PIR-06 attack vector; escalated from 'asas kukuh' to 'quorum' question. On-offense for PN. Neutral sentiment toward him personally.
Grassroots thumbs-up (FMT) + 11 seats no BN clashes (operational success) + Hadi coalition-building. Structurally hollowed by Bersatu 24-solo but operationally holding. Slightly positive.

MIXED: counter-attacks Bersatu (blame-shift) AND builds inclusive anti-DAP coalition (PAS+Umno+MCA+MIC+DHPP). 'Bukan retorik' PRU16-laboratory framing. Coalition-arrangement posture tilts constructive -> slightly improving on PIR-06 dimension.
Not directly quoted this cycle. Carryover watch figure (Bersatu Sec-Gen,PN Sec-Gen). Low source count.
NEW positive PIR-06 signal: FMT grassroots thumbs-up, multiple named supporters, 'unity of ummah', hope nationwide expansion. Partially offsets UMNO-divisional-dissent negative from rev8.
No >20% drop; stable at rev9 level. 'fleeing Sikamat' persists but not intensifying. 064654 cycle adds no new adat-crisis content. Priority-watch (director monitor) but no critical.

Director PIR-07 monitor. Persists (carryover), not intensifying. Aminuddin denies/frames as strategic. 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame NOT gaining negative traction (frame is 'pindah kawasan', not 'fled').
Aminuddin (PH) vs Faizal Ramli (BN) vs Zamri (Bersatu). 3-cornered split structurally helps PH incumbent. 'not taking for granted' + 'fleeing Sikamat' both anchored here.

NEW ENRICHED this cycle (rev9 gap FILLED): Bakri Sawir (PH incumbent) vs Danni Rais (PN, Bakri's cousin) vs Muhammad Adib Musa (Bersatu). 13,355 voters. Cousins campaign peacefully at Pasar Minggu Kuala Klawang; Bakri 'no special challenge, campaign healthily'. Incumbent confident -> NO sentiment drop. Positive mature-campaign framing.

entities.rationale: NEW. Confident Day-1 posture; took down warned flags; 'brotherly fight' with cousin Danni Rais. Positive incumbent signal, no drop.
NEW. Bakri's cousin; PN challenger; peaceful campaign. Neutral, challenger posture.
Nor Azman (PH, Aminuddin's pol-sec) vs Tun Faisal (Bersatu) vs Razali (Wawasan). 3-cornered helps PH. 'fleeing Sikamat' anchored here (Aminuddin vacated). No new negative.
Director PIR-07 watch. PH Nazri Kassim vs PN Rafie. Day-1 messaging war (PH 'defector' vs PN 'experienced rep') carryover, ACTIVE but NOT intensifying in 064654 content. Priority-watch per directive.
PH defence posture. Slightly positive.

entities.rationale: Under PH 'defector' attack. Negative framing target. Priority-watch linked to N.14 defector-framing.
BN 'unfazed' by 3-cornered. BN confidence.
BN Zaifulbahri (2023 maj 4,335) vs PH Danish Nazran. BN incumbent edge.
Candidate detail not recovered. Kept per director list. Low source count.
One of 7 Bersatu-vs-PN direct-clash seats. Clash-friction risk.
5-cornered, high split-risk. PH J Arul Kumar (Loke's aide, 2023 maj 10,889) — strong incumbent. Trigger #7 watch (independents).
5-cornered, Bersatu youngest candidate (23). High split-risk. Trigger #7 watch.

entities.entity: Mohamad Hasan / Tok Mat (BN candidate Rantau)
entities.rationale: NEW 'act now or lose chance forever' (FRESH 14:46 MYT) — existential Malay-future framing ('children become traders in their own country'); racially/religiously charged but energizes BN base; first mooted 2018, fell through. On-message for BN base. Stable/slightly improving.

entities.entity: Datuk Mohd Faizal Ramli (N.32 BN candidate)
entities.rationale: Mature challenger; 'not taking for granted' framing continues (carryover).

NEW 'resign if you want to attack unity partners' (discipline warning, FRESH 14:47 MYT, conveyed with Zahid+Fadillah) + 'Ali Baba 40 thieves' unity counter-narrative. Managing coalition discipline (response to AMH demand). Positive for coalition coherence.
NEW 'adapt Johor formula for NS' — cautious strategic (party strength + candidate selection + machinery). Positive for BN machinery.
Carryover. Stable.

entities.rationale: Contesting, no new signal this cycle.

NEW, amplified EN+BM via FMT. DOMINANT PIR-16 narrative of the cycle. Viral-risk (MCA rebuttal watch — Wee/Mah Hang Soon response expected).
High viral-potential; full body NOT fetched (paywalled). Headline+description derived. Amplification watch continues.
Linked to 'barking dogs'. PN-camp negative framing. Identity beyond 'businessperson in PN shirt' still pending.
DAP brings up 1MDB, ruler crisis. Negative for BN (opposition attack).

entities.rationale: Viral amplifier. PM Anwar responded directly ('resign to attack unity partners') -> confirms AMH demand rose to PM-intervention level. Amplification signal.

Live PIR-16 narrative (Rembau chieftain sacked 3 nobles, court injunction, Loke penyaluran dana). Tok Mat 'act now' is race/religion NOT adat; Anwar 'Ali Baba' is unity not adat. Not intensifying this cycle.
Hadi 'Malay-Muslim unity' + Tok Mat 'race/religion' + BN-PN grassroots thumbs-up all reinforce. Active positive BN-PN coalition narrative.
'BN to decide NS MB candidate only if it wins.' Aminuddin seat-move + MB-credibility referendum. Pressure on Aminuddin.
Muhyiddin 'sole credible opposition' + 'new coalition after NS'. Frames opposition identity. Opposition coherence fractured.
Director PIR-16 monitor. NOT yet directly quoted in 064654 recovered content. Latent — watch for Day-2/Day-3 poll/forecast corroboration.
Director PIR-16 monitor (counter to 'majoriti mudah'). Faizal Ramli 'Linggi stronghold cannot be taken for granted' active defensive framing.
NEW PIR-16 framing: Hadi 'Bukan retorik' + Zaharuddin Sani 'makmal politik' + Azmi Hassan 'Johor formula'. NS as test for PRU16 coalition. Analytical framing surfacing.

entities.entity: 'Act now or lose forever' (Tok Mat existential Malay-future)
entities.rationale: NEW. Polarizing but energizes BN base. Counter to DAP/Madani multi-ethnic narrative.

entities.entity: 'Malay-Muslim unity with non-extreme partners' (Hadi expanded coalition)
entities.rationale: NEW. PAS+Umno+MCA+MIC+DHPP formula; extend to Sabah/Sarawak; reject 'unnatural Malay groups with DAP'. Constructive coalition-building.

entities.entity: 'Ali Baba 40 thieves were also united' (Anwar counter-narrative)
entities.rationale: NEW. Counter to BN-PN Malay-unity framing. Madani multi-ethnic. 'Unite to improve lives, not to steal/plunder'.
NEW. Federal-state firewall; office-holders can't use positions against coalition partners. Response to AMH demand.
NEW. Voters want 'kempen matang, calon fokus kehendak rakyat'; Bakri Sawir (Klawang) embodies it (took down warned flags). Process narrative.

pir_06.verdict: CRITICAL CARRIED + ESCALATED (internal-fracture signal sharp-negative). Formal PN-MT removal notice STILL NOT DETECTED (8 consecutive passes since 170837). Precursors INTENSIFIED this cycle via the Kiandee 'quorum' attack — a qualitatively NEW vector questioning whether Bersatu's Supreme Council even has quorum (internal-legitimacy attack, beyond prior 'asas kukuh to remove'). Combined with PAS-may-be-expelled analyst framing (Star), Bersatu-advised-to-quit-with-Gerakan/MIPP (FMT, IIUM Lau Zhe Wei), and analyst-wipeout pronouncements (USM Azeem Fazwan 'not in position to win solo' + Azmil Tayeb 'perebutan kuasa dalam Bersatu').
pir_06.numeric_shift_check: NO PIR-06 entity exceeds the >30% numeric shift threshold (Muhyiddin +3.7%, Bersatu +8.1%, PN-removal thread +3.7%, Bersatu-PN fracture +5%). CRITICAL fires via the qualitative 'Bersatu internal-fracture signal' rule (Kiandee quorum + analyst power-struggle framing), NOT the numeric rule.
pir_06.bersatu_sharp_negative: YES — internal-fracture signal sharp-negative: quorum question + 'perebutan kuasa dalam Bersatu' (power struggle) + wipeout expectation. -> [CRITICAL] per directive.
pir_06.threshold_status: Formal pecat/termination NOT crossed. Trajectory deepening toward formalization (most likely Bersatu voluntary realignment AFTER Aug 1 poll; reactive PN-MT removal remains possible if Bersatu candidates actively damage PN in the 7 confirmed direct-clash seats).
pir_06.offsetting_signals: BN-PN grassroots thumbs-up (NEW positive +0.45) + Hadi inclusive coalition-building + 11-seats-no-clashes operational success partially offset the structural-hollowing narrative on the coalition-arrangement dimension (but NOT on the Bersatu-internal-fracture dimension).

pir_07.verdict: Day-1 campaign enrichment; NO critical flag. No seat shows incumbent/leading-candidate sentiment drop >20%. N.28 Klawang gap FILLED (rev9 had 'candidate detail not recovered' — now full: Bakri Sawir PH incumbent vs Danni Rais PN vs Muhammad Adib Musa Bersatu, cousins campaign peacefully, incumbent confident -> NO drop, positive). Aminuddin stable at +0.62 (no drop). 'fleeing Sikamat' persists but NOT intensifying. N.14 defector-framing ACTIVE but NOT intensifying.
pir_07.incumbent_drop_gt20: NOT DETECTED (Aminuddin +0.62 stable; Bakri Sawir N.28 confident +0.40).
pir_07.fleeing_sikamat_traction: NOT intensifying (priority-watch only). 'Aminuddin fled Sikamat' frame NOT gaining negative traction — frame is 'pindah kawasan'/'move seat', not 'fled'.
pir_07.n14_defector_intensification: NOT DETECTED (framing present, carryover, not intensifying in 064654 content). Priority-watch per directive.
pir_07.new_day1_coverage: Klawang cousins (Awani), Tok Mat 'act now' (NST), Anwar 'resign to attack' (NST), Anwar 'Ali Baba' (NST), Johari 'Johor formula' (NST). First Day-1 marquee-seat campaign coverage beyond Loke/Chennah (rev9).

pir_16.verdict: NEW CRITICAL (ESC-017): 'Bersatu in disarray' narrative rapid viral amplification (>50% volume — 3 new attack vectors in one cycle: quorum + PAS-expel + quit-advice + analyst-wipeout). NEW PRIORITY (ESC-018): Loke 'MCA biggest loser' amplified EN+BM, MCA-rebuttal amplification watch. NEW PRIORITY (ESC-019): AMH 'BN ministers quit' — PM Anwar responded (amplification signal).
pir_16.viral_amplification_gt50: FIRED for 'Bersatu in disarray' narrative (PIR-06+16 overlap). NOT fired for Melaka DAP (stable/declining visibility this cycle).
pir_16.majoriti_mudah_vs_not_taking_for_granted: 'majoriti mudah' NOT yet quoted (latent, watch). 'not taking for granted' (Faizal Ramli) active. Monitor continues.
pir_16.aminuddin_fled_sikamat_negative_traction: NOT DETECTED — frame is 'pindah kawasan', not 'fled'. No PRIORITY alert on this specific PIR-16 criterion.
pir_16.new_narratives_surfacing: NS=PRU16-laboratory (Hadi+analysts), Tok Mat existential, Hadi MCA/MIC formula, Anwar Ali Baba counter, Anwar resign-to-attack discipline, mature-campaign (voters).

collection_limitations: Kiandee quorum attack (NST) and PAS-may-be-expelled (Star) are headline-intelligence only (gnews JS-rendered; NST feed rotated past top-50) — sentiment at title-level inference.
mkini 'Bersatu exit from PN imminent?' SNAPSHOT + 'MCA biggest loser' (780073) bodies paywalled — preview only.
'barking dogs' (Albert Tei) full body NOT fetched (paywalled) — headline+description derived.
Malaka DAP withdrawal article bodies JS-rendered (Malay Mail) / paywalled (Star) — headline-intelligence cluster only (7+ sources meet multi-source corroboration for the basic fact).
Score convention switched to SIGNED this revision per mission directive (rev1-9 used unsigned magnitude); cross-revision numeric comparisons require sign-aware reading.
next_actions: PIR-06 (HIGHEST): Watch for Bersatu Supreme Council response to Kiandee's quorum question — a formal statement confirming/denying quorum would be threshold-adjacent. Monitor Muhyiddin afternoon/evening statements for 'new coalition' formalization.

PIR-16: MCA rebuttal watch — Loke 'biggest loser' likely draws Wee/Mah Hang Soon response (amplification). Track whether 'Bersatu in disarray' escalates from analyst-opinion tier to formal-notice tier.
PIR-07: Capture afternoon/evening ceramah for T1 seats — Klawang (cousins angle, high viral-risk), Linggi (Aminuddin), Sikamat, Chennah (Loke vs Siow), Rantau (Tok Mat).
Monitor BN manifesto launch 24 Jul (DUN Linggi) for narrative shifts.
Backfill the 20260716 sentiment-analysis gap (1-day gap in time series).
